summary.lv: Air Apps, AI vadīts personīgais un uzņēmuma resursu plānotāja veidotājs, meklē Senior Backend inženieri Romas reģionam ar Node.js, TypeScript un GCP pieredzi.
summary.en: Air Apps, building an AI-powered Personal & Entrepreneurial Resource Planner, is looking for a Senior Backend Engineer for their Rome-based remote team with Node.js, TypeScript, and GCP experience.
